928.step: {"blocks":[{"key":"9rsbh","text":"Add 186.1 g EDTA disodium salt dihydrate (Mallinckrodt 4931) to 700 ml MilliQ water","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
{"blocks":[{"key":"41shm","text":"Bring pH to 8.0 with NaOH (~50ml of 10M NaOH or ~23g NaOH pellets)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

930.step: {"blocks":[{"key":"e6k84","text":"Add 294 g Na Citrate dihydrate (Mallinckrodt 0754-12) to 700ml MilliQ water","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

description: {"blocks":[{"key":"32i5s","text":"This is a storage solution that stabilizes and protectsRNA while inactivating RNase","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

creator.name: Bonnie Poulos
creator.affiliation: Matthew Sullivan Lab, University of Arizona, The Ohio State University

guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"30dlj","text":"Note: If you read the patent application, they refer to an ammonium sulfate concentration of 700g per L. What they really mean is add 700g to 1L (including EDTA and sodium citrate at conc. listed above), so you end up with more than 1L total volume. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9thoa","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2i5j7","text":"Note: The pH should be ~7 using this recipe. The patent states that pH can range from 4-8; the preferred commercial pH is 5.2; I use pH 7 for bacterioplankton samples, but pH can be lowered by adding H2SO4.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":5},{"style":"sub","offset":201,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":204,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9j0l5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9kvil","text":"Note:  Since this is a storage solution for RNA, use high quality reagents (\"molecular biology\" grade) when preparing the buffer.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

mentions.article_citation: Nadia Binte Obaid, András Patyi, Fede Berckx, Maru Bernal-Gómez, Andrea Lavello, Andreas Brachmann, Daniel Wibberg, Jochen Blom, Jörn Kalinowski, Sara Mehrabi, Ivan Robert Kennedy, Philippe Normand, Ulrike Mathesius, Katharina Pawlowski (2026) What lurks beneath the surface? The hidden Frankia biodiversity in Casuarina nodules across continents.Research Square doi: 10.21203/rs.3.rs-8701053/v1

{"blocks":[{"key":"d5u5o","text":"In a 2 or 3 L flask mix 1,400 mL MilliQ water with 60 mL 0.5M EDTA and 37.5 mL 1M sodium citrate with stirring","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"66jv6","text":"While continuing to stir the solution, add 1.05 kg (= 1,050 g) Ammonium sulfate in 100 g amounts. {"blocks":[{"key":"8dtoa","text":"Allow solution to cool at room temperature for at least 30min, but overnight on bench is best ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dqvtp","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"duration","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"duration":"1800","guid":"3B11DBD91B58473896A1491ECF3318AB","id":"35253","label":""}}}}
